items.standfirst: The sprint sensation has claimed his second men’s 200m Australian title, and broken the under-20 world record, with a sizzling run in Sydney.
items.content: The sprint sensation has claimed his second men’s 200m Australian title, and broken the under-20 world record, with a sizzling run in Sydney.
